data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Group seating (keep seats together)', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is implemented or validated. The linked use case mentions that customers can select 4 seats together, but there is no evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is operational. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of group seating functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify group seating functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check that the API allows selection of multiple adjacent seats and confirms their availability.
